message:
test(proptest): add property tests for dependency eradication module

658-line proptest suite covering the dependency_eradication module's
core decision-making types with randomized inputs.

Coverage includes:
- Serde roundtrips for all serializable types
- ViolationSeverity ordering: total order, transitivity
- ScanReport verdict logic: pass when no violations exceed threshold,
  fail when any critical violation exists
- RegressionGuardSet invariants: guard addition, removal, and
  evaluation consistency
- SurfaceContractStatus arithmetic: counter aggregation under
  arbitrary sequences of pass/fail/skip results
- MigrationReport cutover readiness: only marked ready when all
  guards pass and no blocking violations remain

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
